name: Dimensional Image: Wanda
descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Wanda gains [Arg1] Aliemus and [Arg2] {plural:[Arg2]|stack|stacks} of {Dreamlure}. If this is an {Ultra Round}, additionally put 1 Temporary {Spine Needle Chains} and {Keeper of the Lost} into hand, and cause Wanda's next Command Card to take effect 2 times.
